title: 3D Printer Generated Tissue iMolds for Cleared Tissue Evaluation
author: Miller, Rothstein

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Using 3D printers, we designed tissue molds that fit precisely around the specimen being imaged. First, images are taken of the specimen, followed by importing and design of a structural mold, then printed with affordable plastics by a 3D printer.

steps.title: Tissue Staining
steps.instruction: For deep tissue staining we followed the protocol previously established for 5 days with primary antibody and three days for secondary antibody [4].
